_comment: Recorded 2026-04-25 with dspy-ai==3.0 against claude-haiku-4-5. 20 train / 20 test customer-support tickets, binary 'billing'/'technical'. baseline = dspy.Predict zero-shot. optimized = MIPROv2 light, max_bootstrapped_demos=4, max_labeled_demos=4, num_trials=10 (~120 LLM calls).
task: Classify a customer-support ticket as 'billing' or 'technical'.

optimized.instruction: You are a customer-support triage assistant. Classify the ticket as exactly one of two categories: 'billing' for tickets about invoicing, payments, refunds, plan changes, or pricing; 'technical' for tickets about login failures, API errors, integration bugs, or service downtime. Reply with the single word and nothing else.

demos.ticket: I was charged twice for my April subscription, please refund the duplicate.
demos.label: billing

demos.ticket: Webhook deliveries returning 500 since 14:00 UTC, please check.
demos.label: technical

demos.ticket: How do I downgrade from Pro to Free plan?
demos.label: billing

demos.ticket: Login button does nothing on Safari 18, console shows 401.
demos.label: technical

tickets: Need an invoice copy for the March 2026 billing cycle.
OAuth callback failing with 'invalid_state' for users in EU region.
Cancelling my account, please confirm I will not be billed next month.
Rate limit headers seem off — getting throttled at 200 rpm not 600 rpm.
Card on file expired, where do I update payment details?
API returns empty results when query contains a Unicode em-dash character.
Charged for the Team plan but my org only signed up for Pro.
Slack webhook integration silently dropped after the 0.4.2 release.
Educational discount — do you offer a student or academic price?
504 Gateway Timeout from /v1/search endpoint during 02:00-04:00 UTC.
When does my annual contract auto-renew, and how do I disable that?
Embedding endpoint returning NaN for inputs longer than 8000 tokens.
Need a W-9 form for tax purposes, can you send one to billing@acme.com?
DNS lookups for spectrum-search.io are intermittently failing.
Refund request — purchased annual plan by mistake, want monthly instead.
PostgreSQL connector crashes with OOM on databases above 50 GB.
How do I switch the billing currency from EUR to GBP?
Helm chart 4.2 fails to install on Kubernetes 1.28 with a CRD conflict.
Quote request for 50-seat enterprise license please.
API requests intermittently return 502 from the eu-west-1 region.
